originalTitle: The Google Pixel Watch 5 may have been spoiled by… the creator of Borderlands
summary: We may just have gotten an early look at the Google Pixel Watch 5 - and from an unusual source. Randy Pitchford, the creator of the Borderlands game franchise, posted a pair of images of a watch on X, saying that his friend found it underwater while scuba diving near Saint Martin, as reported earlier […]
content: We may just have gotten an early look at the Google Pixel Watch 5 — and from an unusual source. Randy Pitchford, the creator of the Borderlands game franchise, posted a pair of images of a watch on X, saying that his friend found it underwater while scuba diving near Saint Martin, as reported earlier by Kotaku. “He noted that the reverse of the watch indicates that it is a Google Pixel 5, which has not yet been announced, let alone released,” Pitchford writes. “It seems to be fine. The face indicates an empty battery, but seems to have enough reserve power to display the correct time.” After putting out a call to find its owner, Pitchford said someone contacted him and that he’s “arranged for its return.” Google didn’t immediately respond to The Verge’s request for comment. [Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/Screenshot-2026-06-01-at-4.42.39PM.png?quality=90&strip=all] Details about the upcoming Pixel watch are still slim, though previous rumors suggested that it could come with Google’s in-house Tensor processor. The whole ordeal is reminiscent of the leak of the very first Pixel Watch in 2022. At the time, someone posted images of the unannounced device on Reddit, claiming that their bartender friend found it at the restaurant where they work. (We can’t leave out the iPhone 4 leak from 2010 either.)  Google typically shows off its newest Pixel devices in August. That means we’ll find out if someone really dropped a not-yet-revealed Pixel Watch 5 into the ocean in just a few short months.
chineseTitle: Google Pixel Watch 5 可能被《无主之地》的创作者宠坏了
chineseSummary: 我们可能刚刚从一个不寻常的来源初步了解了 Google Pixel Watch 5。 《无主之地》系列游戏的创始人兰迪·皮奇福德 (Randy Pitchford) 在 X 上发布了两张手表的图片，称他的朋友在圣马丁附近水肺潜水时在水下发现了它，正如之前报道的那样 [...]
chineseContent: 我们可能刚刚从一个不寻常的来源初步了解了 Google Pixel Watch 5。正如 Kotaku 早些时候报道的那样，《无主之地》系列游戏的创始人兰迪·皮奇福德 (Randy Pitchford) 在 X 上发布了两张手表的图片，称他的朋友在圣马丁附近水肺潜水时在水下发现了它。 “他指出，手表的背面表明它是 Google Pixel 5，但尚未发布，更不用说发布了，”Pitchford 写道。 “看起来没问题。表面显示电池已空，但似乎有足够的储备电量来显示正确的时间。”皮奇福德表示，在拨打电话寻找失主后，有人联系了他，他已“安排归还失主”。谷歌没有立即回应 The Verge 的置评请求。 [图片：https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/Screenshot-2026-06-01-at-4.42.39PM.png?quality=90&strip=all] 有关即将推出的 Pixel 手表的详细信息仍然很少，尽管之前有传言称它可能配备谷歌内部的 Tensor 处理器。整个经历让人想起 2022 年第一款 Pixel Watch 的泄露事件。当时，有人在 Reddit 上发布了这款未发布设备的图片，声称他们的调酒师朋友在他们工作的餐厅发现了它。 （我们也不能忽略 2010 年 iPhone 4 的泄露事件。）Google 通常会在 8 月展示其最新的 Pixel 设备。这意味着我们将在短短几个月内查明是否真的有人将尚未发布的 Pixel Watch 5 掉进了海里。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
